name: Hot Mess Summer
overview: Rylan plays host to eight party-loving Brits, all a liability on a night out. They think they're in Zante for a summer of fun but have really been nominated by their mates - sick of their antics - to run a busy pool bar, doing everything from mixing cocktails to cleaning toilets. If they can resist temptation they could share up to £60 grand. But that's easier said than done for these Hot Messes.
